long_desc: The Avatar's Shalynon  is sitting here.
detailed_desc:
NOW!!!!!!.  &n This is the powerful God Shalynon, which appeared in the form of
a titan.  Here is the place where he listens the confessions of Shalyzaar.  He
doesn't look calm or happy, so, attacking him could not be a good idea.  
&RLEAVE THIS PLACE NOW!!!!!!.  &n
